allow: Bash(zsh -lc 'which node; which pnpm; ls -la /usr/local/bin 2>/dev/null; find / -maxdepth 4 -iname "node" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20')
Bash(zsh -lc 'ls -la ~/.nvm/versions/node 2>/dev/null; ls -la ~/.volta 2>/dev/null; ls -la ~/Library/pnpm 2>/dev/null; command -v fnm; command -v volta; echo done')
Bash(zsh -lc 'command -v asdf; ls -la ~/.asdf 2>/dev/null; find /Applications -maxdepth 1 -iname "*node*" 2>/dev/null; mdfind "kMDItemFSName == node" 2>/dev/null | head -20')

Bash(zsh -lc 'ls -la /opt 2>/dev/null; ls -la /usr/local 2>/dev/null; ls -la /Library/Frameworks 2>/dev/null | grep -i node; xcrun -f node 2>/dev/null; echo "---brew---"; command -v brew; brew --prefix node 2>/dev/null')
Bash(zsh -lc 'which node pnpm npm; node -v; pnpm -v')
